title: Sending a letter to Studio Khara
display_title: Sending a letter to Studio Khara
wikitext:
[]: Sending a letter to Studio Khara.             Quote Post by Shark Knight » Thu Apr 28, 2016 4:18 pm Hey, I was thinking on sending a letter to Anno and studio Khara alongside some goodies "Bluray movies" that I would like to share with them and stuff. Does anyone have their studio phone number or address? I would greately appreciate if someone could help me out. :p

[]: Re: Sending a letter to Studio Khara.             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Apr 28, 2016 5:19 pm Japanese wiki usually has addresses for places, and it does in this case https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E3%82%AB ... A%E7%A4%BE ) EDIT: although there was some indications they were moving earlier this year so I'm not sure that's up to date. Try molesting the Contact page on the official site? http://www.khara.co.jp/contact/
